title: Jive Junction
writer: Malvin Wald, Walter Doniger, Irving Wallace
actors: Dickie Moore, Tina Thayer, Gerra Young
plot: Classically-trained young musician Peter Crane transfers from the Conservatory to Clinton High School, where he discovers that his music is in conflict to that of the high school's world of jive and Hep Cats. Claire falls for Pete...
